---
title: 'Empowered 2 Prosper: Excellence'
date: '2012-01-25T18:57:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5956619001560168662'
blogger_filename: '/2012/01/empowered-2-prosper-excellence_25.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/2011/12/excellence.html?spref=bl">Empowered 2 Prosper: Excellence</a>: Excellence      Philippians 3:8 WBT   Yes doubtless, and I count all things [to be] loss for the   excellence   of the knowledge of Christ...
